classes.reasoning: The document is explicitly titled 'Foglio informativo e modulo di consenso informato per la partecipazione dei pazienti ai sottostudi facoltativi' (Information sheet and informed consent form for patient participation in optional sub-studies). It contains structured sections for Introduction, Information, and Consent Expression, includes signature blocks for patient, witness, and investigator, and references consent for optional tumor biopsy sub-studies within the main study IOV-MEL-202.

trial_title: Studio di fase 2, multicentrico, in aperto su lifileucel (linfociti infiltranti il tumore [TIL]) in partecipanti con melanoma avanzato precedentemente trattato
summary: This is an Italian-language Informed Consent Form (ICF) for optional sub-studies within a Phase 2 clinical trial of lifileucel (tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes) in advanced melanoma. It invites patients already enrolled in the main study (IOV-MEL-202) to consent to two optional tumor biopsy sub-studies: post-treatment and post-progression biopsies. The document explains procedures, risks (surgical biopsy), benefits (research contribution), data handling, and patient rights to withdraw.
references_to: ICF principale che ha già firmato (per maggiori informazioni)
Decreto ministeriale del 15 luglio 1997 'Recepimento delle linee guida dell'Unione europea di buona pratica clinica per la esecuzione delle sperimentazioni cliniche dei medicinali'
